name: SliceShow

values.name: container
values.type: (List.List (Html.Html (SliceShow.Message b)) -> Html.Html (SliceShow.Message b)) -> List.List (SliceShow.Content a b) -> SliceShow.Content a b

values.name: hide
values.comment: Hide content, except for the prev and next buttons
values.type: SliceShow.Content a b -> SliceShow.Content a b

values.name: init
values.comment: Init Model from the list of slides
values.type: List.List (List.List (SliceShow.Content a b)) -> SliceShow.Config a b

values.name: next
values.type: List.List (Html.Attribute Basics.Never) -> List.List (Html.Html Basics.Never) -> SliceShow.Content a b

values.name: prev
values.type: List.List (Html.Attribute Basics.Never) -> List.List (Html.Html Basics.Never) -> SliceShow.Content a b

values.name: setDimensions
values.comment:
Set custom dimensions for the slide's content.
The default dimensions are (1024, 640).
values.type: ( Basics.Int, Basics.Int ) -> SliceShow.Config a b -> SliceShow.Config a b

values.name: setSubscriptions
values.comment: Set subscriptions for the custom content
values.type: (a -> Platform.Sub.Sub b) -> SliceShow.Config a b -> SliceShow.Config a b

values.name: setUpdate
values.comment: Set update for the custom content
values.type: (b -> a -> ( a, Platform.Cmd.Cmd b )) -> SliceShow.Config a b -> SliceShow.Config a b

values.name: setView
values.comment: Set view for the custom content
values.type: (a -> Html.Html b) -> SliceShow.Config a b -> SliceShow.Config a b

values.name: show
values.comment:
Start the SliceShow with your `slides`:
app = show (init slides)
main = app.html
port tasks : Signal (Task.Task Never ())
port tasks = app.tasks
values.type: SliceShow.Config a b -> Platform.Program () (SliceShow.Model.Model a b) (SliceShow.Messages.Message b)
